title: BEM-620 supersede old fails
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

workflows={
 'curator_hourly':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'provider_gate':'.github/workflows/claude-primary-provider-gate.yml',
 'role_router':'.github/workflows/role-orchestrator-internal-router.yml',
 'mailbox_dispatcher':'.github/workflows/mailbox-dispatcher.yml'
}
checks=[]
for name,path_s in workflows.items():
    p=Path(path_s)
    text=p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
    checks.append({'name':name+'_exists','pass':p.exists(),'path':path_s})
    checks.append({'name':name+'_no_inline_python_heredoc','pass':("<<'PY'" not in text and '<<PY' not in text and 'cat >' not in text),'path':path_s})
    checks.append({'name':name+'_conflict_safe_commit','pass':('git diff --cached --quiet' in text or name not in ['curator_hourly','provider_gate','role_router','mailbox_dispatcher']) and ('--autostash' in text or name not in ['curator_hourly','provider_gate','role_router','mailbox_dispatcher']),'path':path_s})

# Only curator-hourly-report may keep schedule.
schedule_files=[]
for p in list(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yml'))+list(Path('.github/workflows').glob('*.yaml')):
    if 'schedule:' in p.read_text(errors='ignore'):
        schedule_files.append(str(p))
checks.append({'name':'schedule_only_curator_hourly','pass':schedule_files==['.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'],'schedule_files':schedule_files})

# Force a new live trigger now that workflow contains the fixed no-heredoc implementation.
trigger=triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-620 live trigger after superseding old failed runs 2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'+sep)

all_pass=all(x.get('pass') for x in checks)
status='passed_static_validation_live_trigger_committed' if all_pass else 'static_validation_failed_live_trigger_committed'
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'WORKFLOW_STATIC_VALIDATION_FAILED','failed':[x for x in checks if not x.get('pass')]}

protocol=protocols/'STALE_GITHUB_RUN_FAILURE_SUPERSEDED.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-620 | Stale GitHub Run Failure Superseded'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Context'+sep+'Operator screenshots show failed workflow runs from earlier commits before BEM-609 and BEM-614 fixes.'+sep+sep+'## Current rule'+sep+'Do not treat old GitHub notification failures as current system state without checking latest workflow file and latest fix commits.'+sep+sep+'## Current action'+sep+'Latest workflows were statically checked for no inline Python heredoc and conflict-safe commit steps. A new curator hourly report trigger was committed after the fixes.'+sep)

state={'schema_version':'workflow_failure_supersede.v1','bem':'BEM-620','status':status,'checks':checks,'live_trigger':str(trigger),'stale_failed_runs':['curator-hourly-report at b301659 before BEM-614','claude-primary-provider-gate at 4622f80/before BEM-609'],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-620 | Supersede Old Failed Runs And Live Trigger | '+('PASS' if all_pass else 'WARN')+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Result'+sep+status+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x.get('pass') else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Live trigger'+sep+str(trigger)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger','cycle_id':'bem620-supersede-old-failed-runs-and-live-trigger','source':'gpt','status':status,'checks_passed':all_pass,'live_trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        contour_state={}
contour_state['bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'live_trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['hourly_report_template_flow']='old_failures_superseded_live_trigger_committed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:54 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-620 '+('PASS' if all_pass else 'WARN')+': old failed runs superseded; live trigger committed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(trigger),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Superseded stale failed workflow runs, statically validated latest workflows, and committed new live hourly report trigger')
"""
No issue comments.
